positive: A stylized, symmetrical circular emblem featuring a majestic bioluminescent fox sitting at the base of an abstract constellation tree. The fox is composed of glowing celestial elements, contrasting against a deep indigo midnight sky background. The design utilizes clean line work, geometric patterns, and strong contrast between glowing gold/cyan accents and dark sapphire blue. Highly detailed vector style, perfect for screen printing on apparel, with a minimalist, magical, ethereal aesthetic. Centered composition, isolated on a transparent-looking background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, gradient, photo-realistic, cinematic, messy
